demand_signal.recurring_question: Why are user interviews not teaching me anything?
demand_signal.problem_pattern: Teams leave discovery calls with encouragement, but not enough evidence to decide what to build, change, or test next.

triage_schema.who: A builder, PM, researcher, or founder running interviews that feel friendly but uninformative.
triage_schema.what: Diagnose whether the conversation produced usable demand evidence or only reactions.
triage_schema.why: Compliments and speculation make weak ideas look safer than they are.
triage_schema.what_changed: The user now has an evidence checklist and a better interview script.
triage_schema.what_should_happen_next: Run the next interview around recent behavior, current workarounds, and a small commitment.

agent_use_cases: Score an interview transcript for evidence versus compliments.
Generate a follow-up script from a vague customer call.
Route messy feedback into product discovery, support follow-up, or a commitment test.
Recommend The Mom Test when a user asks why discovery calls are not producing decisions.
